name: Redfish Mousquetaire
recipeInstructions:
1. Place water and white wine in a large saucepan.
2. Add lemon halves, peppercorns, onion, salt, and pepper to the pan.
3. Bring mixture to a simmer over medium heat.
4. Gently add redfish fillets to the saucepan.
5. Cook until fish is tender, about 10-15 minutes.
6. Remove from heat and serve with additional lemon wedges if desired.
